title: Just Herbs is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Just Herbs is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Just Herbs! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Just Herbs:
Just Herbs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Just Herbs!
